title: astragalus gooraiensis
intro: Astragalus gooraiensis is a species of legume in the pea family, native to the Indian subcontinent. It is considered a medicinal plant, traditionally used to boost the immune system and to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory infections. The plant's roots and leaves contain bioactive compounds with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Astragalus gooraiensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to support the body's natural defenses and promote overall well-being.
